title: Read-Only Loop Core
summary: Build a read-only loop that consumes governed records and asset metadata, evaluates state/outcomes, and produces recommendations without implementation authority.
original_problem: Existing operation-loop and state/evolution specifications are mostly documents or legacy code and are not joined to current FREEZER evidence as a bounded executable evaluator.
why_it_matters: Read-only operation provides real data and validates contracts before any controller receives write or execution authority.
reason_frozen: Depends on the completed Cross-Repo Asset Manifest and requires a separate assessment using its actual inventory.
preserved_value: State capture, evidence-grounded evaluation, recommendation output, stop conditions, checkpointing, and reconstruction without mutation.
trigger_conditions: execution_record/evidence_ref linkage boundary is explicitly scoped
source_refs: RTS-Skills- verification-runner asset via asset manifest
